title: helichrysum × selago
intro: Helichrysum × selago is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Helichrysum sanguineum and Helichrysum ciliatum, both members of the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum × selago include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin and digestive issues. Herbal preparations often involve infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
